video_summary: A casual block puzzle game where the player places pink and cream heart-imprinted blocks onto a dark brown grid to clear lines and score points.
gameplay_loop: The player selects block shapes from the bottom of the screen and drags them onto the 8x8 grid. Filling a horizontal or vertical line clears those blocks, triggering visual effects, score popups, and combo multipliers.
camera_and_canvas: 2D top-down view, static camera, portrait orientation.

art_style.summary: Casual 2D puzzle game featuring soft, candy-like blocks with heart imprints on a warm brown background.
art_style.rendering: 2D vector-style with soft shading to create a faux-3D beveled appearance.
art_style.line_work: No outlines on game pieces; thick, contrasting outlines on UI text.
art_style.palette: Warm and sweet: dark chocolate browns, soft pinks, cream/light yellows, with bright UI accents.
art_style.shading: Soft gradients and edge highlights for a tactile, rounded feel.
art_style.scale_feel: Chunky, stylized, and tactile, resembling physical candy or game pieces.

assets.name: Main Background
assets.visual_description: A solid, warm, medium-brown background that fills the screen behind the game board.
assets.gameplay_role: Provides a neutral backdrop for the game elements.
assets.background_plate_notes: A simple solid color or very subtle gradient.

assets.name: Grid Board
assets.visual_description: A dark brown, 8x8 grid board with a subtle, slightly rough texture, resembling dark chocolate or stained wood.
assets.gameplay_role: The main play area where blocks are placed.
assets.background_plate_notes: Needs to be clean of any placed blocks for a base template.

assets.name: Pink Block Tile
assets.visual_description: A single square tile, colored soft pink, with a raised heart shape in the center and beveled edges, resembling a piece of chocolate or candy.
assets.gameplay_role: The primary puzzle piece used to fill the grid.

assets.name: Cream Block Tile
assets.visual_description: A single square tile, colored cream or light yellow, with a raised heart shape in the center and beveled edges.
assets.gameplay_role: A secondary puzzle piece used to fill the grid.

assets.name: Crown Icon
assets.visual_description: A simple, flat, golden-yellow crown icon.
assets.gameplay_role: Decorative UI element next to the high score.

assets.name: Gear Icon
assets.visual_description: A simple, flat, light brown gear icon.

assets.name: Glowing Heart UI
assets.visual_description: A large, soft, glowing pink heart shape that pulses behind the top score area.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual feedback for achieving a combo.

assets.name: Horizontal Clear Glow
assets.visual_description: A bright, glowing horizontal bar with a yellowish-white center and fading edges.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual effect indicating a cleared row.
assets.animation_notes: Fades in quickly, holds briefly, then fades out.

assets.name: Vertical Clear Glow
assets.visual_description: A bright, glowing vertical bar with a yellowish-white center and fading edges.
assets.gameplay_role: Visual effect indicating a cleared column.
assets.animation_notes: Fades in quickly, holds briefly, then fades out.

assets.name: Block Debris Particles
assets.visual_description: Small, 3D-looking flying debris particles, including tiny cubes and swirl shapes in cream and pink colors.
assets.gameplay_role: Particle effect accompanying a line clear.
assets.animation_notes: Bursts outward from the cleared line and fades out.

assets.name: Sparkle Particle
assets.visual_description: A simple, glowing four-pointed star or diamond shape, usually white or light yellow.
assets.gameplay_role: Accent particle effect for clears and popups.

assets.name: Combo Text
assets.visual_description: The word 'Combo' in a bubbly, rounded font, colored light brown with a darker brown outline and a slight 3D pop effect.
assets.animation_notes: Pops up, scales slightly, then fades.

assets.name: Good Text
assets.visual_description: The word 'Good!' in a bubbly, rounded font, colored bright green with a darker green outline.
assets.animation_notes: Pops up, scales slightly, then fades.

assets.name: Great Text
assets.visual_description: The word 'Great!' in a bubbly, rounded font, colored bright yellow with a darker orange/brown outline.
assets.gameplay_role: Positive feedback text for larger clears.
assets.animation_notes: Pops up, scales slightly, then fades.

assets.name: United Text
assets.visual_description: The word 'United' in a bubbly, rounded font, colored white with a pink gradient and a thick red outline.
assets.gameplay_role: Special feedback text for multi-line clears.
assets.animation_notes: Pops up, scales slightly, then fades.

assets.name: Thumbs Up Icon
assets.visual_description: A small, glowing green circular icon containing a white thumbs-up symbol.
assets.gameplay_role: Appears on blocks being cleared during a combo.
assets.animation_notes: Pops in and fades out quickly.

assets.name: Placement Highlight
assets.visual_description: A bright, semi-transparent white/pink square highlight that flashes over grid cells when a block is placed.

assets.name: Score Popup Text
assets.visual_description: Floating numbers indicating points gained, appearing in pink or yellow bubbly font.
